data.body: Investigation complete (INTERMEDIATE). ROOT_CAUSE: REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4 dispatch templates do not include WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR, so write-reviewer-findings.sh in sub-agent context hashes sub-agent's REPO_ROOT (potentially different from orchestrator's), writing reviewer-findings.json to wrong /tmp/workflow-plugin-<hash>/ directory; record-review.sh reads from orchestrator's ARTIFACTS_DIR, finding stale file or missing file. Prior fix 04ca-4c91 added --findings-file to record-review.sh but never updated the calling workflow. Fix: update REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4 dispatch templates to include WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR={ARTIFACTS_DIR} in all reviewer sub-agent prompts. Testing_mode: GREEN.
